siteMetadata.title: SuperCoolNeato
siteMetadata.description: a few of my favorite things

nodes.excerpt: A lot of time went into planning my dream stereo, which is to say that I spent a good deal of time researching in the vortex of WhatHiFi?, Reddit, and Stereophile. In the end, I was able to source most of the components refurbished or open-box b-stock for just under 2k. "2000 for a stereo?" you…
